name: Puffco Proxy
summary: A modular concentrate and hash vaporiser from Puffco that attaches to different glass, for patients prescribed extracts.
description: The Puffco Proxy is a one-button device for concentrates and hash, built around a 3D Chamber and a detachable base that fits the included glass pipe or other Proxy glassware. It heats in about 30 seconds, offers a boost mode and 15 heat settings, and gives feedback through an LED with an auto-sleep function. A dry-herb flower bowl is available separately, but it's primarily a concentrate device. It suits a patient prescribed hash or extracts who wants something portable and modular rather than a fixed rig. Recharge takes around 90 minutes, so it's a sit-down session device more than an all-day carry.
